created_at.description: Time the Action Plan Item was created

description.description: Description of the Action Plan Item

due_at.description: Due Date of the Action Plan Item

holding_type.description: Action Plan Item holding type specifies whether the current item holds all the succeeding items in the section or the plan

is_blocked.description: Indicates whether current Action Plan Item is blocked by another Action Plan Item

is_blocking.description: Indicates whether current Action Plan Item is blocking other Action Plan Items

notes.description: Notes for the Action Plan Item

plan_id.description: Plan ID the Action Plan Item belongs to

position.description: Position of the Action Plan Item

plan_section_id.description: Action Plan Section ID the Item belongs to

title.description: Title of the Action Plan Item

id.description: Status ID for the Action Plan Item (1 - open, 2 - in_progress, 3 - delayed, 4 - closed)

template_item_id.description: Template Item ID the Action Plan Item originated from

updated_at.description: Time the Action Plan Item was updated
